Baseline and hub conflict means: 0 at 365d; 0.71/0.79 at 1,000d; 2.08/2.10 at 2,000d

claims.claim: Cross-seed means: |r| ACF .170, r^2 ACF .183, spread 1.38, sign ACF .486 vs .009 band, cancel ratio .537, vol-vol .113, kurtosis 1.99 (SD 1.33), Hill 5.38, return ACF -.082, impact corr -.013 (hw .004)

Firm greenwashing/disclosure and transition-investment rules contain no own-share-price input; the only direct own-share market read is the treasury financing rule (sell_treasury at order-book midpoint)
Three compared regimes named current_eu_supervision, sme_algorithmic_prescreening, certified_green_data_connector
q_truthful = clip(0.20 + 0.70 x real environmental score, 0, 1)
Sanction = 1.5 x estimated benefit + 0.02 x affected revenue x severity x confidence; caps track-gated at 1% ordinary, 4% widespread consumer, 3% CSDDD
Default capacity 20 evidence requests and 5 investigations per period; 10% random surveillance; 30-day first-time correction window
Conflict cases enter the queue at priority 0.85 with a default 20% capacity reserve
Eight default connector source types covering Scope 1/2, renewable share, water, waste/recycling, pollution, partial Scope 3, and environmental capex
claims.observed: 8 sources: scope_2_emissions, scope_1_emissions, renewable_energy_share, water_intensity, recycling_rate, pollution_intensity, scope_3_emissions, environmental_capex

claims.claim: z<1 noise; 1-2.5 inconclusive; 2% materiality line; self-declared uncertainty capped at 2x evidence SE; repeat escalation needs >=4 findings in 365 days with mean z >= 0.5
V_fair = V_fundamental x (1 + greenium x posterior x credibility) x (1 - controversy discount); unsophisticated investors respond more slowly (0.40 controversy scaling)
Productivity multiplier 1 - 0.03 x (1 - trust); annual turnover starts at 10%, capped at 30%; 30-day onboarding
Consumers allocate an exogenous EUR 1,000 daily budget by logit utility
Latent truth is evaluator-only and never enters agent decisions (information-safe architecture, enforced by tests)
claims.evidence: results/configuration.json research_only_metrics; tests/ (information-boundary suite, 177 tests passing)
claims.observed: They are never passed into firm, consumer, investor, workforce, hub, connector, or regulator decisions.

claims.claim: Directive 2024/825 applies 27 Sep 2026; CSRD national scenario 19 Mar 2027; CSDDD applies 26 Jul 2029; day 1 = 1 Jan 2026
CSRD scope: net turnover exceeding EUR 450m AND more than 1,000 employees, conjunctive, strict inequalities (equality does not qualify)
The revised CSDDD undertaking-scope test (5,000 employees / EUR 1.5bn) is NOT implemented; the paper says the model gates CSDDD by date and remedy track only
claims.observed: no 5,000/1.5bn scope constants found (matches paper's disclaimer)

claims.claim: Green Claims pre-verification is a disabled counterfactual (off by default)
All stated LHS sampling ranges match the executed campaign's recorded parameter space
